scripts.dev:my-restaurant: cp apps/restaurant/.env.my-restaurant apps/restaurant/.env.local && npm run dev --workspace=restaurant
scripts.dev:verde-kitchen: cp apps/restaurant/.env.verde-kitchen apps/restaurant/.env.local && npm run dev --workspace=restaurant
scripts.build:my-restaurant: cp apps/restaurant/.env.my-restaurant apps/restaurant/.env.local && npm run build --workspace=restaurant
scripts.build:verde-kitchen: cp apps/restaurant/.env.verde-kitchen apps/restaurant/.env.local && npm run build --workspace=restaurant
scripts.generate:cms-types: cd ../restaurant-platform-cms && npx payload generate:types && sed '/declare module .payload./,/^}/d' payload-types.ts > ../Web/packages/ui/src/payload-types.ts
